mainCharacter.name: Sun Wukong
mainCharacter.backstory: When chaos first separated, Pangu split heaven and earth, and the spiritual energy of the world condensed into a divine stone, from which a stone monkey was born. This stone monkey took Patriarch Bodhi as his master, mastered countless skills, and was later given the name Sun Wukong.
mainCharacter.combatStyle: High-speed combat based on a transformation system, combined with skill sets drawing on traditional Chinese mythology elements

supportCharacters.name: White Dragon Horse
supportCharacters.identity: One of the Eight Dragon Kings of Heaven
supportCharacters.background: Originally the Third Prince Ao Lie of the Dragon King of the Western Sea, he was demoted to the form of a horse for offending the laws of heaven, and later accompanied Tang Sanzang on the journey to the West, becoming Sun Wukong's companion

supportCharacters.name: Red Boy
supportCharacters.background: Son of the Bull Demon King and Princess Iron Fan, he cultivated the Samadhi Fire and commands the True Samadhi Flames

supportCharacters.name: Six-Eared Macaque
supportCharacters.background: The being in heaven and earth most similar to the Great Sage Equal to Heaven, possessing abilities comparable to Sun Wukong

gameFeatures.worldSetting: Based on the mythological backdrop of Journey to the West, blended with a fictional fantasy world
gameFeatures.combatSystem: A unique transformation-based combat system combined with high-difficulty action gameplay
gameFeatures.progression: A skill tree development system to unlock new combat skills and transformation forms
gameFeatures.exploration: Open-map exploration with rich side quests and hidden storylines
gameFeatures.graphics: Powered by Unreal Engine 5 for high-quality visuals and real-time ray tracing
